title: Client Side Cosmetics
description: Customize your armor trims, shield banners, and capes client-side with a 360° player preview and improved shield rendering.
body:
---

# **Client Side Cosmetics**

---

This mod lets you change your armor trims, shield banners, and capes on the client side.

---

## 🛡️ Armor Customization

* Change trims on your armor freely
* Works on all armor types (e.g. diamond, netherite, etc.)
* Includes a **live 3D player preview** with full **360° rotation**
* Rotation lock available for stable preview viewing
* Save up to **9 presets**
* Presets can be easily **loaded or cleared**

### Keybinds

* **Open cosmetics menu** → `K` (default)
* **Switch presets**
* **Toggle trims on/off**

---

## 🎨 Shield Banner Editor

* Customize shield banners locally
* Add banners using a command format like:

  ```
  minecraft:black_banner{...}
  ```
* You can also paste full commands like:

  ```
  /give @p minecraft:black_banner{...}
  ```
* Save banners to **favorites**
* Remove saved banners anytime
* Right-side panel shows a **live preview**
* You can **reset** or **save** the current pattern
* Includes an **HD shield rendering fix**:

  * Makes shield banners match the original banner design
  * Fixes vanilla scaling and pattern issues
  * Experimental feature

---

## 🧥 Cape Customization

* Change your cape appearance client-side
* Supports all standard capes (e.g. Minecon capes)
* Separate cape selection for:

  * normal cape rendering
  * elytra cape rendering
* Also includes capes that are normally unavailable

---

## 🌐 Community

* Discord: [https://discord.gg/mZGSGEgGbT](https://discord.gg/mZGSGEgGbT)
